---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2025-04-01"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Install necessary packages (only run this once)
install.packages("tableone", repos = "https://cran.r-project.org/")
install.packages("papaja", repos = "https://cran.r-project.org/")
install.packages("flextable", repos = "https://cran.r-project.org/")
install.packages("officer", repos = "https://cran.r-project.org/")
install.packages("gtsummary", repos = "https://cran.r-project.org/")
install.packages("gt", repos = "https://cran.r-project.org/")

# Load required libraries
library(gtsummary)
library(dplyr)
library(flextable)
library(officer)
library(papaja)
library(tableone)
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(kableExtra)
library(gt)

# Load datasets
load("C:/Users/malmag/Documents/cohort_outcomes_2y_3_final.Rdata")
load("C:/Users/malmag/Documents/cohort_outcomes_5y_3_final.Rdata")

# Combine datasets
cohort_outcomes_2yn <- cohort_outcomes_2y |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(date_censoring_2y = date_censoring, 
         date_emigration_2y = date_emigration,
         outcome_2y = outcome,
         time_to_outcome_2y = time_to_outcome)

cohort_outcomes_5yn <- cohort_outcomes_5y |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(date_censoring_5y = date_censoring,
         date_emigration_5y = date_emigration,
         outcome_5y = outcome,
         time_to_outcome_5y = time_to_outcome)

# Combine the datasets, ensuring no column duplication
cohort_outcomes_c <- cbind(cohort_outcomes_2yn, cohort_outcomes_5yn[setdiff(names(cohort_outcomes_5yn), names(cohort_outcomes_2yn))])

# Create the empty variables for table layout
cohort_outcomes_c$empty1 <- NA
cohort_outcomes_c$empty2 <- NA
cohort_outcomes_c$empty3 <- NA
cohort_outcomes_c$empty4 <- NA
cohort_outcomes_c$empty5 <- NA
cohort_outcomes_c$empty6 <- NA
cohort_outcomes_c$empty7 <- NA

# List of variables to include in the table
listvar <- c("age", "female", "empty1", "empty6", "ckd_epi_2009_cr", "ckd_epi_2021_cr", "ekfc_cr", "lmr_cr", "empty2", "ckd_epi_2012_cys", "capa_cys", "ekfc_cys", "lmr_cys", "empty3", "ckd_epi_2012_cr_cys", "ckd_epi_2021_cr_cys", "ekfc_cr_cys", "lmr_cr_cys", "creat", "cys", "alb", "empty4", "mi", "ihd", "hyperten", "hf", "stroke", "cevd", "arrh", "pvd", "dm", "cancer", "copd", "liver", "empty5", "bblock", "hypoglycemic", "ccb", "diur", "rasi", "lipid", "nsaid", "outcome_2y", "time_to_outcome_2y","outcome_5y", "time_to_outcome_5y")

# Continuous and categorical variables
continuous <- c("age", "ckd_epi_2009_cr", "ckd_epi_2021_cr", "ekfc_cr", "lmr_cr", "ckd_epi_2012_cys", "capa_cys", "ekfc_cys", "lmr_cys", "ckd_epi_2012_cr_cys", "ckd_epi_2021_cr_cys", "ekfc_cr_cys", "lmr_cr_cys", "creat", "cys", "alb", "time_to_outcome_2y", "time_to_outcome_5y")
catvar <- listvar[!listvar %in% continuous]

# Define labels for the variables
labels <- c("Age, median (IQR), y", 
            "Female, n (%)", 
            "Median eGFR (IQR), mL/min/1.73m2",
            " Creatinine-based equations",
            "  CKD-EPIcr 2009, ml/min/1.73m2",
            "  CKD-EPIcr 2021, ml/min/1.73m2",
            "  EKFCcr, ml/min/1.73m2",
            "  RLMcr, ml/min/1.73m2",
            " Cystatin C-based equations",
            "  CKD-EPIcys 2012, ml/min/1.73m2",
            "  CAPAcys, ml/min/1.73m2",
            "  EKFCcys, ml/min/1.73m2",
            "  RLMcys, ml/min/1.73m2",
            " Creatinine-cystatin C-based equations",
            "  CKD-EPIcr-cys 2012, ml/min/1.73m2",
            "  CKD-EPIcr-cys 2021, ml/min/1.73m2",
            "  EKFCcr-cys, ml/min/1.73m2",
            "  RLMcr-cys, ml/min/1.73m2",
            "Median serum creatinine (IQR), mg/dL",
            "Median serum cystatin C (IQR), mg/L",
            "Median UACR (IQR), mg/g",
            "Comorbidities, n (%)",
            " Myocardial infarction",
            " Other Ischemic Heart Disease",
            " Hypertension",
            " Heart Failure",
            " Stroke",
            " Other cerebrovascular disease",
            " Arrhythmia",
            " Peripheral vascular disease",
            " Diabetes mellitus",
            " Cancer in previous year",
            " Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease",
            " Liver disease",
            "Medications, n (%)",
            " Beta blocker",
            " Calcium channel blocker",
            " Diabetes medications",
            " Diuretic",
            " ACEi/ARB",
            " Lipid lowering drug",
            " NSAID",
            "Outcome 2 years, n (%)",
            " Alive without KFRT",
            " KFRT",
            " Death without KFRT",
            " Median time to event (IQR), days",
            "Outcome 5 years, n (%)",
            " Alive without KFRT",
            " KFRT",
            " Death without KFRT",
            " Median time to event (IQR), days")

# Create the summary table using gtsummary
table_ovr_gtsummary <- cohort_outcomes_c |>
  select(all_of(listvar)) |>
  tbl_summary(
    by = NULL,  # No grouping
    statistic = list(
      all_of(continuous) ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})",  # Median and IQR for continuous
      all_of(catvar) ~ "{n} ({p}%)"                    # Count and percentage for categorical
    ),
    digits = list(
      all_continuous() ~ 0,  # Round continuous to 1 decimal
      all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1),  # Round percentages to 1 decimal
      "cys" ~ 2,
      "time_to_outcome_2y" ~ 1,
      "time_to_outcome_5y" ~ 1
    ),
    missing = "no") |>  # Exclude missing values
  modify_table_body(~ .x |> 
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(. %in% "0 (NA%)", "", .)))  # Replace values with empty strings
  ) |>
  modify_table_body(~ .x |> mutate(label = labels)) |>   # Assign labels
  modify_footnote(everything() ~ NA)

# Convert to gt table
table_ovr_gt <- as_gt(table_ovr_gtsummary) |>
  tab_header(title = "Table 1. Baseline characteristics")

# Save the table to a Word document
gtsave(table_ovr_gt, "baseline_characteristics_table13.docx")

```
